propositions.text: spent two weeks in South Korea last spring — Seoul and Busan

started a standing-desk trial at work for my back

the building's water will be off on Thursday morning

the balcony tomatoes are ripening early this year

cleared out and cancelled the storage unit — sold the last of the furniture
the neighbours' renovation starts Monday

cancelled the veg box for good — we just don't cook enough to keep up

started a house-deposit savings pot this month
